notes: Refreshed for v1.12 (spec 44 Step 4d headless-mode fixes for gemini/copilot/codex). Both findings persist despite spec 30 + spec 34 hardening; the scanner is heuristic on `gh pr view`/`gh pr diff` (W011) and external-CLI handoff (W012). The v1.12 change moved copilot's prompt from stdin to `-p` on argv (documented as a residual risk under the SKILL's `## Security model`, backstopped by the Step 4b secret scan); gemini and codex retain stdin transport. W012 is the same external-CLI-handoff heuristic that drifts between local and CI runs of the pinned `0.5.1` scanner (the package version does not pin the scanner's server-side backend model) — local `--update-baselines` runs intermittently report only W011, but CI consistently reports W011+W012, so both are retained to avoid a false regression. Mitigations are documented in skills/peer-review/SKILL.md `## Security model`.
